basics.name: Youxing LI
basics.summary: Researching Multimodal Learning, Riemannian Deep Learning, and Data Mining.

work.company: Bauhinia AI Limited / Prof. Kani Chen's Lab @ HKUST
work.summary: Led end-to-end development of TradingNews.press, an AI-powered financial news analysis platform with multi-agent workflow orchestration.
highlights: Led end-to-end development of TradingNews.press from inception, encompassing algorithm design, system architecture, and production deployment.
Architected CRDR workflow orchestration (Channel→Relevant→Decision→ReAct) using LangGraph state machines with parallel processing.
Developed 7 specialized financial analysis agents with custom prompt engineering and Pydantic output schemas.
Implemented text-grad architecture with stock price tracking and prompt propagation computation graph via LLM-as-a-judge framework.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

education.area: BSc in Quantitative Finance — Jinhe Center for Economic Research

publications.name: Riemannian Sliced Wasserstein Distance on Correlation Matrix

portfolio.name: TradingNews.press — AI Financial News Platform
portfolio.description: AI-powered financial news analysis and investment signal generation platform built with multi-agent workflow orchestration.

portfolio.name: Tsinghua Economic Hotspot Analysis Competition — Top 1%
portfolio.description: Led team research on AI-enabled coal mining transformation. Built Cobb-Douglas model, conducted field research at 6 enterprises.
